audit_items.proof_trace: Cleanup function deletes pointers but doesn't nullify them (lines 328, 333, 337, 341). If called multiple times, subsequent calls check non-null dangling pointers and attempt double-delete, causing undefined behavior. Classic use-after-free via double-delete pattern.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers multiple cleanup calls through library shutdown/restart sequences or error conditions, causing double-delete of availableRegions/hashtables leading to heap corruption and potential RCE.
